title: Bridge Essay: Mental imagery: The role of primary visual cortex in aphantasia.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal Reconstruction** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Imaginal — mental imagery as real perception, imagination activating sensory cortices, aphantasia.

**Mental imagery: The role of primary visual cortex in aphantasia.**. Curr Biol.. PMID: 39500282. DOI: 10.1016/j.cub.2024.09.076. The neural underpinnings of aphantasia - aphenomenon where people have an absence of mental imagery - are poorly understood. Two recent studies provide the first direct evidence linking brain activation in primary visual cortex to the imagery deficits in aphantasia.
